description: Hand-authored synthetic augmented factual recall prompts with varied question styles.

documents.text:
Flashcard front: The capital city of Japan.
Flashcard back: Tokyo

Complete the fact.
The chemical symbol for gold is: Au

Q: Which ocean lies between Africa and Australia?
A: Indian
{"question":"What instrument has keys, hammers, and strings?","answer":"piano"}

Trivia round
Prompt: The author of Hamlet was William ____.
Completion: Shakespeare

Answer in one word only.
Largest planet in the Solar System -> Jupiter
Knowledge check: water freezes at 0 degrees on the Celsius scale. Scale: Celsius

Fill in the blank: A young dog is called a ____.
Filled blank: puppy
